typeProperties.script:
parameters{
	DATE_PERIOD as string (),
	LogId as integer (),
	pFMForecastDestDB_ConString as string (),
	pFMForecastLogDB_ConString as string ()
}

source(output(
		Company as string,
		{Prod Item No} as string,
		MINVL as string,
		ProductName as string,
		{Prod Item Type} as integer,
		Date as timestamp,
		{Inventory Posting Group} as string,
		Quantity as integer,
		Tonnage as integer,
		MarsYear as integer,
		MarsPeriod as string,
		MarsWeek as string,
		YearPeriod as integer
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	isolationLevel: 'READ_UNCOMMITTED',
	query: 'SELECT  CONVERT(NVARCHAR(3), (case when P.[DATAAREAID]=\'NV1\' then \'AIM\' when P.[DATAAREAID]=\'NV2\' then \'LRD\' else P.[DATAAREAID] end)) AS Company, [Prod Item No], COALESCE (I.MINVL, \'UNKNOWN\') AS MINVL, I.[DESCRIP] AS ProductName, [Prod Item Type], [Date], P.[Inventory Posting Group], ABS(sum([Quantity])) AS Quantity, ABS(sum([Tonnage])) AS Tonnage, [MarsYear], [MarsPeriod], [MarsWeek], CAST ((CAST ([MarsYear] AS varchar(10))+Right([MarsPeriod],2)) AS INT) AS [YearPeriod]    FROM [Forecast].[dbo].[EDW Production Fact RCSAS] P    LEFT OUTER JOIN (  SELECT A.MINOS, A.DESCRIP, A.MINVL FROM dbo.Item_MASTER A  INNER JOIN (  SELECT MINOS, MAX(MINVL) AS MAXMINVL FROM dbo.Item_MASTER  GROUP BY MINOS  ) B ON A.MINOS = B.MINOS AND A.MINVL = B.MAXMINVL )  I  ON  P.[Prod Item No] = I.[MINOS]     LEFT OUTER JOIN [Forecast].[dbo].[EDW Time RCSAS] AS T ON P.[Date]=T.TheDate   LEFT OUTER JOIN [Forecast].[dbo].[EDW Product RCSAS] AS C  ON C.[Inventory Posting Group] = P.[Inventory Posting Group]  AND C.[No] = P.[Prod Item No] AND C.[DATAAREAID] = P.[DATAAREAID]  WHERE C.[Inventory Posting Group] = \'FIN GOOD\'   Group by P.[DATAAREAID], [Prod Item No], MINVL, I.[DESCRIP], [Prod Item Type], [Date], P.[Inventory Posting Group], [MarsYear], [MarsPeriod], [MarsWeek]',
	format: 'query',
	staged:false) ~> ProductionActualspostgolive	source(output(
		Company as string,
		{Prod Item No} as string,
		MINVL as string,
		ProductName as string,
		{Prod Item Type} as integer,
		Date as timestamp,
		{Inventory Posting Group} as string,
		Quantity as integer,
		Tonnage as integer,
		MarsYear as integer,
		MarsPeriod as string,
		MarsWeek as string,
		YearPeriod as integer
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	isolationLevel: 'READ_UNCOMMITTED',
	query: 'SELECT  CONVERT(NVARCHAR(3), (CASE WHEN P.[DATAAREAID]=\'NV1\' THEN \'AIM\' WHEN P.[DATAAREAID]=\'NV2\' THEN \'LRD\' ELSE P.[DATAAREAID] END)) AS Company, [Prod Item No], COALESCE (I.MINVL, \'UNKNOWN\') AS MINVL, I.[DESCRIP] AS ProductName, [Prod Item Type], [Date], P.[Inventory Posting Group], ABS(sum([Quantity])) AS Quantity, ABS(sum([Tonnage])) AS Tonnage, [MarsYear], [MarsPeriod], [MarsWeek], CAST ((CAST ([MarsYear] AS varchar(10))+Right([MarsPeriod],2)) AS INT)AS [YearPeriod]    FROM [Forecast].[dbo].[EDW Production Fact RCSAS] P    LEFT OUTER JOIN (  SELECT A.MINOS, A.DESCRIP, A.MINVL FROM dbo.Item_MASTER A  INNER JOIN (  SELECT MINOS, MAX(MINVL) AS MAXMINVL FROM dbo.Item_MASTER  GROUP BY MINOS  ) B  ON A.MINOS = B.MINOS AND A.MINVL = B.MAXMINVL )  I  ON  P.[Prod Item No] = I.[MINOS]     LEFT OUTER JOIN [Forecast].[dbo].[EDW Time RCSAS] AS T ON P.[Date]=T.TheDate  Group by P.[DATAAREAID], [Prod Item No], MINVL, I.[DESCRIP], [Prod Item Type], [Date], P.[Inventory Posting Group], [MarsYear], [MarsPeriod], [MarsWeek]',
	format: 'query',
	staged:false) ~> ProductionActualsRCSASprgolive	source(output(
		{} as string
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	isolationLevel: 'READ_UNCOMMITTED',
	query: 'SELECT  CONVERT(NVARCHAR(3), (CASE WHEN [DATAAREAID]=\'NV1\' THEN \'PL\' ELSE [DATAAREAID] END)) AS Company, [Prod Item No], COALESCE (I.MINVL, \'UNKNOWN\') AS MINVL, I.[DESCRIP] AS ProductName, [Prod Item Type], [Date], [Inventory Posting Group], ABS(sum([Quantity])) AS Quantity, ABS(sum([Tonnage])) AS Tonnage, [MarsYear], [MarsPeriod], [MarsWeek], CAST ((CAST ([MarsYear] AS varchar(10))+Right([MarsPeriod],2)) AS INT) AS [YearPeriod]  FROM [Forecast].[dbo].[EDW Production Fact RNI] AS P  LEFT OUTER JOIN (  SELECT A.MINOS, A.DESCRIP, A.MINVL FROM dbo.Item_MASTER A INNER JOIN (  SELECT MINOS, MAX(MINVL) AS MAXMINVL FROM dbo.Item_MASTER  GROUP BY MINOS  ) B ON A.MINOS = B.MINOS AND A.MINVL = B.MAXMINVL )  I  ON  P.[Prod Item No] = I.[MINOS]  LEFT OUTER JOIN [Forecast].[dbo].[EDW Time RNI] AS T ON P.[Date]=T.TheDate  WHERE [DATAAREAID] in (\'NV1\') and [Inventory Posting Group]=\'FIN GOOD\'  Group by [DATAAREAID], [Prod Item No], I.MINVL, I.[DESCRIP], [Prod Item Type], [Date], [Inventory Posting Group], [MarsYear], [MarsPeriod], [MarsWeek]',
	format: 'query',
	staged:false) ~> ProductionActualsRNI0
ProductionActualspostgolive split(YearPeriod < 202010 && Company == 'LRD',YearPeriod < 202101 && Company == 'AIM', disjoint: true) ~> ConditionalSplit1@(PrgoliveLRD,PrgoliveAIM,Postgolive)
ProductionActualsRCSASprgolive split(YearPeriod > 202009 && Company == 'LRD',YearPeriod > 202013 && Company == 'AIM', disjoint: true) ~> ConditionalSplit@(PostgoliveLRD,PostgoliveAIM,Prgolive)
ProductionActualsRNI0 sink(input(
		Company as string,
		ProductName as string,
		Quantity as integer,
		Date as timestamp 'dd-MM-yyyy',
		Inventory_Posting_Group as string,
		MarsYear as integer,
		Tonnage as integer,
		MarsWeek as string,
		MarsPeriod as string,
		YearPeriod as integer,
		MINVL as string,
		Prod_Item_Type as integer,
		Prod_Item_No as string
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	stagingSchemaName: 'dbo',
	saveOrder: 10000,
	insertable:true,
	deletable:false,
	upsertable:false,
	updateable:false,
	keys:[],
	mapColumn(
		Company,
		ProductName,
		Quantity,
		Date,
		Inventory_Posting_Group = {Inventory Posting Group},
		MarsYear,
		Tonnage,
		MarsWeek,
		MarsPeriod,
		YearPeriod,
		MINVL,
		Prod_Item_Type = {Prod Item Type},
		Prod_Item_No = {Prod Item No})) ~> ProductionActualsRNI
ConditionalSplit1@Postgolive,ConditionalSplit@Prgolive union(byName: true) ~> UnionAll
UnionAll sink(input(
		Company as string,
		ProductName as string,
		Quantity as integer,
		Date as timestamp 'dd-MM-yyyy',
		Inventory_Posting_Group as string,
		MarsYear as integer,
		Tonnage as integer,
		MarsWeek as string,
		MarsPeriod as string,
		YearPeriod as integer,
		MINVL as string,
		Prod_Item_Type as integer,
		Prod_Item_No as string
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	stagingSchemaName: 'dbo',
	saveOrder: 10000,
	insertable:true,
	deletable:false,
	upsertable:false,
	updateable:false,
	keys:[],
	mapColumn(
		Company,
		ProductName,
		Quantity,
		Date,
		Inventory_Posting_Group = {Inventory Posting Group},
		MarsYear,
		Tonnage,
		MarsWeek,
		MarsPeriod,
		YearPeriod,
		MINVL,
		Prod_Item_Type = {Prod Item Type},
		Prod_Item_No = {Prod Item No})) ~> ProductionActualsRCSAS
